title: Limited Edition Omnium x Cinelli Supercargo
content:
Cinelli and OMNIUM, have teamed up to create a limited run of OMNIUM Supercargo frames to celebrate both brands’ sponsorship of the 2026 Cycle Messenger World Championships in Milan. The frames feature a special Cinelli color and Columbus tubeset.

OMNIUM and Cinelli, two iconic cycling brands sharing roots from the city streets, have joined forces to bring to life a unique bike that’s designed to carry everything, fast – the OMNIUM x Cinelli Supercargo.

Cinelli x OMNIUM Supercargo Quick Hits

  • Frame Material – Double Butted Chromoly Steel Frame mixed with Columbus Tubings
  • Crankset – OMNIUM Wide Narrow Cranks 42t
  • Brakes – SRAM Level TL | IS mount
  • Shifter – SRAM Apex
  • Derailleur – SRAM Apex 11 SPD
  • Weight – 20kg (Medium – complete bike)
  • Standard Rack Weight – 1320g +/-
  • livery inspired by Cinelli’s legendary Laser bike
  • limited to 120 frames and bikes only

The OMNIUM x Cinelli Supercargo is available in three sizes – Small, Medium, Large – and retails for €3500 for a complete bike and €1800 for framekit only.

Timeless Classic Meets New School Cool

Cinelli has long been a cultural reference point in urban riding and racing, championing several legendary fixed gear designs along the way. Perhaps the most memorable was the Cinelli x MASH collaboration. Born from this long-standing partnership was the world’s first urban-specific performance track frame, the Cinelli–MASH. It was released in 2009 and instantly become a subcultural phenomenon.

Founded in 2012 by Danish cycle courier Jimmi Bargisen, OMNIUM has been serving cycle messengers and couriers for over a decade. The Copenhagen based brand is no stranger to the Messenger World Championships too, winning the Championships in both 2018 and 2019.

“I couldn’t be more excited about our collaboration with Omnium. We both bring our unique skills and histories to this one — it’s a mashup of Omnium’s functionality and ruggedness blended with Cinelli’s Milanese design language, all driven by our shared passion and love for the global messenger community. Most of all, our teams have become good friends, and we hope this project is just the start of doing cool things together.” – Victor Luis, Cinelli Chairman

“Working with a benchmark brand as Cinelli undoubtedly is, has been amazing. Obviously being aligned on our passion for bikes, but also combining our aesthetics and culture has been a great start to a hopefully long-lasting relationship. And naturally the timing couldn’t have been better, being able to launch during CMWC, which we usually take part in, and then in Milan. It just makes sense.” -Matias Ovens, CEO of OMNIUM

Limited Edition Collaboration

Just 120 of this limited edition Supercargo are being produced. Each frame is individually numbered and painted an iconic colorway Azzuro Laser. This color was featured on Cinelli’s Olympic and World Championship winning Laser track bike. In a first for OMNIUM, the frames are built from a unique combination of Columbus and OMNIUM tubing. The frame blends classic Italian steel heritage with modern cargo functionality.

Alongside the new bike, Cinelli and OMNIUM have also dropped a limited OMNIUM x Cinelli apparel and accessories. The collection features Tees, Caps, Socks, Bidons, as well as a unique Messenger Bag.

See the limited edition Supercargo at Cinelli and OMNIUM.

author: Paul Kalifatidi
